citations: [Permanent prostate brachytherapy: lessons learned, lessons to learn.](https://pubmed.ncbi.nlm.nih.gov/10929587/)

evidence.source_title: Permanent prostate brachytherapy: lessons learned, lessons to learn.
evidence.raw_snippet:
PubMed ID: 10929587. 2000/07/01 00:00. PURPOSE: To investigate the biochemical control rate in patients undergoing 
permanent prostate brachytherapy as a function of the biologically effective 
dose (BED) and risk group.
METHODS AND MATERIALS: Six centers provided data on  permanent 
brachytherapy patients with postimplant dosimetry results. The mean 
prostate-specific antigen level was 8.9 ng/mL. (125)I was used in  (58%), 
(103)Pd in , and supplemental external beam radiotherapy in 882 (22.5%)
